'''Sith Intelligence and Assassination''' was an agency of the [[One Sith]] of [[Darth Krayt]]. It was in charge of espionage, political assassination, interrogation and [[Torture/Legends|torture]]. Around [[130 ABY]], it was headed by [[Darth Maladi]]. [[Jor Torlin]] was one of its ranking agents.

[[Darth Maladi's laboratory]], in the [[Temple of the Sith]], was a location of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Intelligence and Assassination.

{{Stub}}
